introSection: Tyfoon is a steel roller coaster located at DippieDoe Attractiepark in Eindhoven, North Brabant, Netherlands.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Blue track and white supports. Used to feature red track and supports when operating at Tivoli.

fullText:
Tyfoon is a steel roller coaster located at DippieDoe Attractiepark in Eindhoven, North Brabant, Netherlands.



Blue track and white supports. Used to feature red track and supports when operating at Tivoli.
